reviews.comment:
Bajo una estrella de 5 a 4 porque el agua caliente para mate cobran la ficha $400. Una desprolijidad ética....es estación de servicios o lucro? Además del pago del combustible con ganancias inclusive?

(Translated by Google)
I've dropped a star rating from 5 to 4 because they charge $400 for hot water for mate. This is an ethical sloppiness... is it a gas station or a profit-making business? And even paying for fuel with profits?

reviews.comment:
Dios mío, mala organización, mala señalización, pésimo servicio debido a que el personal no da abasto para la cantidad de gente que carga nafta en épocas de veranear en Brasil. Baños sucios. Debería haber un cambio de autoridades en esa YPF y mostrar mejor a la petrolera de insignia Argentina.

(Translated by Google)
My goodness, poor organization, poor signage, terrible service because the staff can't keep up with the number of people filling up with gas during the summer holidays in Brazil. Dirty bathrooms. There should be a change of leadership at that YPF and a better representation of Argentina's flagship oil company.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRaHZHbmpnRRAB
